question: List the names of districts that produced maize but did not produce any wheat during the year 1970, sorted alphabetically.

JOIN fact_cereals_major fcm ON dg.geography_id = fcm.geography_id

JOIN fact_cereals_minor fcmi ON dg.geography_id = fcmi.geography_id AND fcm.year_id = fcmi.year_id 
WHERE dy.year = 1970 AND fcmi.maize_area_1000ha > 0 AND fcm.wheat_area_1000ha = 0
